news.t: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025

holdings.infoBox: SBAR is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Simplify Barrier Income ETF (SBAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks to provide monthly income with a stated downside risk barrier of 30% over a one-year period. The actively managed fund holds US government securities while employing a put option spread writing strategy on a major US equity ETF SBAR was launched on Apr 14, 2025 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.
